subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast rent thy garment in divine love! His honour Áqá Siyyid Ḥasan had penned a letter and made mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گریبان چاک در عشق الهى جناب آقا سید حسن مکتوبى مرقوم نموده بود و ذکر آن
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
